action.reasoning: Observation: Codec augmentation worsened EER (0.1022 vs 0.0913). The error was from local testing. Analysis: Need to go back to basics - the original frozen encoder model was better. Key insight: the domain gap is from codecs, but simulated codecs don't match. Better approach: (1) train longer with frozen encoder, (2) use better pooling/head, (3) try different layer weighting. Decision: Train 10 epochs with frozen encoder, no augmentation, and submit the best model.
